site.legalDescription: W 1/2 OF SW 1/4 OF SE 1/4 OF NW 1/4 LESS E 211.59 FT LESS N 400 FT LESS CO RD TGW E 7.5 FT OF SE 1/4 OF SW 1/4 OF NW 1/4 LESS N 400 FT LESS CO RD
site.notes: CONFIRMED (King County Assessor + GIS, 2026-04-10): APN 2926059206, legalDescription from eReal Property, yearBuilt 1939, lotSF 28,314 SF (GIS: 27,823 SF). RSX 7.2 zoning from listing data (pending ePlanning confirm). Standards from KZC Ch 15.30 Ord. 4196: height 30 ft, front 20 ft, rear 10 ft, side 5 ft, max lot coverage 50%. lat/lng from KC GIS polygon centroid -- verify via geocode. lotWidth/lotDepth are bounding-box estimates (irregular parcel, 7-vertex polygon); confirm via King County tract map. baseFAR 0.5 = 50% lot coverage approx equivalent (KZC uses coverage not FAR; placeholder only). | TBD - D: community plan + transit overlays -- Kirkland Comprehensive Plan; TPA check -- PSRC GIS. Airport -- BFI (Boeing Field) ALUCP, not SeaTac (site is Kingsgate area). Seismic -- Seattle fault zone proximity. | TBD - E: Fees -- City of Kirkland permit fee schedule; impact fees and utility connection fees. | TBD - F: Project type, architect, scope of work. | TBD - G: Inspector contacts -- City of Kirkland Permit Center (425) 587-3600. | TBD - H: Parcel polygon -- pending KC GIS vertex extract. Map rotation from aerial.

planningAreas.name: COMPREHENSIVE PLAN AREA
planningAreas.val: Kingsgate Neighborhood — Single Family / Low Density Residential. Kirkland 2044 Comprehensive Plan (adopted Dec 2024). Outside Totem Lake Urban Center boundary. Source: Kirkland Kingsgate Neighborhood Plan; 2044 Comp Plan.

planningAreas.name: LAND USE DESIGNATION
planningAreas.val: Single Family Residential / Low Density Residential — RSX 7.2 zone (7,200 SF min lot), Kingsgate area. Verify exact parcel designation on Kirkland GIS (kirklandwa.gov/gis). Source: KZC Chapter 15; Kirkland 2044 Comp Plan (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: TRANSIT PRIORITY AREA
planningAreas.val: TBD — KC Metro stop #74714 at Totem Lake Blvd & NE 124th St is ~0.5–0.8 mi west. Measure walking distance; if <0.5 mi qualifies under WA HB 1110 frequent transit area. Lot size (28,314 SF) likely already permits middle housing without TPA bonus. Source: pugetsndtransit.org stop #74714 (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: URBAN GROWTH AREA (UGA)
planningAreas.val: Yes -- Kirkland is within King County UGA

planningAreas.name: MOBILITY / TRANSIT ACCESS
planningAreas.val: KC Metro routes 225 and 239 stop at Totem Lake Blvd & NE 124th St (~0.5–0.8 mi W). Totem Lake Urban Center with planned I-405 BRT proximity. Source: King County Metro (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: AIRPORT INFLUENCE AREA
overlayZones.val: No — outside all airport noise contours. BFI (Boeing Field) ~8 mi SW; 65 DNL contour does not reach Kirkland at this distance (~11 mi from runway). Paine Field (PAE) ~14 mi N, contours do not extend south. No Kirkland airport overlay or noise district in KZC. FAR Part 77 notification applies only for structures ≥200 ft AGL (not applicable to SFR). Source: BFI Part 150 Study; FAA BFI noise compatibility program (federalregister.gov 2025-10587) (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: COASTAL / SHORELINE
overlayZones.val: No Lake Washington shoreline designation — ~2.5–3 mi east of Lake Washington; outside 200 ft SMA buffer. Standard site-specific CAR required. Source: Kirkland Shoreline Master Program (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: VERY HIGH FIRE HAZARD
overlayZones.val: No — Kingsgate is fully developed suburban Kirkland. WA DNR Wildfire Hazard draft map (not finalized 2026-04) does not designate urbanized east-side King County neighborhoods. Source: WA DNR Wildfire Hazard and Risk Mapping draft (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: SEISMIC / FAULT ZONE
overlayZones.val: Seismic Hazard Area — site at 47.712°N is NORTH of Seattle Fault main trace (~47.61°N); lower fault rupture risk than south-of-fault sites. Cascadia Subduction Zone applicable. Upland Kingsgate soils = lower liquefaction risk. Standard seismic design (ASCE 7/IBC). Geotech review required for new multi-unit construction. Source: Seattle Fault Wikipedia; USGS Pacific NW seismic hazards (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: FEMA FLOOD ZONE
overlayZones.val: Likely Zone X — upland Kingsgate area, no flood-prone streams at NE 124th. Confirm via msc.fema.gov or KC iMap (gismaps.kingcounty.gov/parcelviewer2/). Source: FEMA MSC; KC iMap (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: CRITICAL AREAS (WA)
overlayZones.val: No critical areas flag identified at this address; no stream corridors or wetlands noted. Standard site-specific CAR required per KZC critical areas regulations at permit submittal. Source: King County wetlands GIS; Kirkland critical areas (2026-04-15).
